# NSExtensionActivationDictionaryVersion

**Property List Key**

The version of the parent extension-activation rule dictionary.

## Configuration

- **NSExtensionActivationUsesStrictMatching**: A Boolean value indicating whether strict or fuzzy matching is used when determining the asset types an app extension handles.

items.description: A Boolean value indicating whether strict or fuzzy matching is used when determining the asset types an app extension handles.
items.name: NSExtensionActivationUsesStrictMatching
